Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2025

Information We Collect

HomesAndGardenDecor.com collects limited information to operate and improve the site:

  • Usage data — pages visited, time on site, referring pages, collected via Google Analytics (anonymized)
  • Contact information — only if you email us directly

Cookies

This site uses cookies for Google Analytics tracking and affiliate program attribution (Rakuten). These cookies do not collect personally identifiable information beyond standard web analytics data.

Google Analytics

We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use this site. Data is aggregated and anonymized. You can opt out via the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

Affiliate Links

When you click affiliate links, you are directed to third-party retailer websites operating under their own privacy policies.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personally identifiable information to third parties.

Contact

Privacy questions: admin@irongatestrategic.com

Independent analysis. Real specifications. Honest assessments for the home built to last.

Affiliate Disclosure

HomesAndGardenDecor.com participates in affiliate programs. We earn commissions when you purchase through our links at no extra cost to you. We only recommend products that meet our engineering-grade evaluation standards.
